---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the NLZiet Kodi addon
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...")

## Description
Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as detailed as possible.

## Motivation
Why do you need this feature? What would it improve for you and other users?

## Example Use Case
Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used:
- User logs in
- User navigates to [feature]
- [Expected behavior]

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative approaches you've considered.

---

## Related to Existing Features
- [ ] This relates to authentication
- [ ] This relates to performance
- [ ] This relates to UI/UX
- [ ] This relates to playback
- [ ] This relates to metadata/artwork
- [ ] This is a new feature category

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.

---

**Priority:**
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Would improve the addon
- [ ] High - Significant improvement needed

**Estimated Effort:**
- [ ] Small (< 4 hours)
- [ ] Medium (4-8 hours)
- [ ] Large (> 8 hours)
- [ ] Unknown
